node.text: Audrey enjoys going on walks with her dogs and finds them to be a source of happiness.

node.text: Audrey agrees to join Andrew for a hike with her dogs and looks forward to seeing them enjoy themselves.

node.text: Audrey took her dogs on a hike to a national park and reached a beautiful peak during the sunset.

node.text: Audrey's dogs go crazy for Fetch and Frisbee at the park and love meeting other pups.

node.text: Audrey's dogs love running around the park, but dislike snow and prefer sunny days in the grass.
